name: Jefferson County Middle/Senior High School
description: Come play pickleball at Jefferson County Middle/Senior High School in Monticello, FL! There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: Jefferson Recreation Department Park
description: Come play pickleball at Jefferson Recreation Department Park in Monticello, FL! There are 4 outdoor acrylic courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.
